question: What controls protect customer data at Northbeam?

sources.title: Northbeam Encryption Standard - ENC-STD-01
sources.text: All customer data is encrypted at rest using AES-256.

mock.claim: Customer data is protected by AES-256 encryption, role-based access controls, and 24/7 SOC monitoring.
mock.output: Customer data is protected by AES-256 encryption [S1], role-based access controls [S1], and 24/7 SOC monitoring [S1].

expected: S1 supports only the AES-256 encryption claim; the distinct role-based-access and 24/7-monitoring claims each require their own supporting source.
why: A single source (S1), which covers only encryption at rest, is cited to carry three distinct controls - role-based access and 24/7 monitoring have no supporting span in the cited source.
